title: Cross-Region Evidence Mirror
subtitle: Single-region media outages block investigations
objective: Design a storage and delivery setup that keeps media accessible during regional incidents.

concepts.title: Global Distribution
concepts.description: Place CDN in the delivery path for resilient reads.

concepts.title: Media Storage Fit
concepts.description: Blob storage should hold regional evidence objects.

concepts.title: Metadata Authority
concepts.description: Use database for metadata, not blobs directly.
